title: Subtract Business Days
excerpt: Currently the workday formula does not support subtracting days.  I would also like automations for pushing dates to support negative values.  Many workflows require due dates and steps may need to be completed prior to …

posts.author: cewebst2 (Caroline Webster)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently the workday formula does not support subtracting days. I would also like automations for pushing dates to support negative values. Many workflows require due dates and steps may need to be completed prior to that due date.
